svg.title: Banana spoilage detection — multimodal pipeline
svg.desc: Two parallel pipelines (image and numerical sensor) feed into a confidence-weighted late fusion stage that outputs a ripeness class.

g.text: Scale · PCA · outlier removal · label remap
SVM · RF · ANN · KNN · GB · XGB · 1D-CNN
w_v = C_v / (C_v + C_n) w_n = C_n / (C_v + C_n)
